understanding.goal_understanding: Place every selectable piece onto goal tiles marked '+' at the same time; if there are multiple goals, all must be occupied simultaneously to trigger WIN and progress through all levels until the game is completed.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each MOVE action attempts to shift the currently selected piece by one grid cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction, but walls/boundaries can prevent movement; some adjacent objects may be pushable and move along if pushed. Levels can have multiple selectables, and control is switched using CLICK on the exact pixel coordinates of another selectable; movement_blocked hints only indicate adjacency and don’t guarantee the move will fail.

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_RIGHT | Try moving right to see if the adjacent wall blocks or if there is any wrap/slide behavior along the boundary.
history.reasoning: Try moving right to see if the adjacent wall blocks or if there is any wrap/slide behavior along the boundary.

history.summary: Turn 2: CLICK | Current selectable is boxed in by walls on all four sides; switch to the other selectable to see if it has an exit or can interact differently.
history.reasoning: Current selectable is boxed in by walls on all four sides; switch to the other selectable to see if it has an exit or can interact differently.

history.summary: Turn 3: CLICK | This piece is boxed in by walls on all sides, so switch back to the other selectable to continue navigating toward the goal area.
history.reasoning: This piece is boxed in by walls on all sides, so switch back to the other selectable to continue navigating toward the goal area.

history.summary: Turn 4: MOVE_RIGHT | All directions show adjacent wall; try moving right to probe if the boundary allows sliding/teleport despite the blocked hint.
history.reasoning: All directions show adjacent wall; try moving right to probe if the boundary allows sliding/teleport despite the blocked hint.

history.summary: Turn 5: MOVE_RIGHT | Test if the adjacent selectable/wall combo allows a push/merge; moving right is the only possible interaction to probe.
history.reasoning: Test if the adjacent selectable/wall combo allows a push/merge; moving right is the only possible interaction to probe.

history.summary: Turn 6: CLICK | We’re boxed in by walls on all four sides, so we need to switch to the other selectable and try moving it toward the goal area.
history.reasoning: We’re boxed in by walls on all four sides, so we need to switch to the other selectable and try moving it toward the goal area.

history.summary: Turn 7: MOVE_UP | Move up onto the goal area; the tile above is marked as a goal and should be enterable despite the wall hint.
history.reasoning: Move up onto the goal area; the tile above is marked as a goal and should be enterable despite the wall hint.

history.summary: Turn 8: MOVE_RIGHT | Step onto the goal area by moving right into the adjacent goal tile region.
history.reasoning: Step onto the goal area by moving right into the adjacent goal tile region.
